channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Alphabet eyes $80 billion capital raise for AI push, secures $10 billion from Berkshire
item.description: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion, including Berkshire Hathaway's investment, to fund AI infrastructure, cloud growth and data centre expansion. [Alphabet]

item.title: Why did Alphabet raise $80B for AI spending? #tech
item.description: Alphabet plans an $80B equity raise to fund AI infrastructure Alphabet announced it will raise $80 billion through equity sales to finance its planned AI buildout and compute needs. The unusually large fundraising approach reflects the scale of ongoing invest… [Alphabet]

item.title: What is Alphabet raising and for what purpose? #tech
item.description: The headline Alphabet says it plans to raise $80 billion in equity capital to help fund its AI infrastructure buildout. What the money is supposed to do The stated goal is to support the scale of computing and infrastructure investment required for AI product… [Alphabet]

item.title: ​The $80 billion AI gamble: Decoding Alphabet's mega fundraise
item.description: Alphabet, the parent company of Google, plans to raise $80 billion through a series of equity offerings to fund a major expansion of its artificial intelligence infrastructure. The move represents one of the largest capital-raising efforts ever undertaken by … [Alphabet, Intel]
